overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a sunny suburban Los Santos neighborhood. The character traverses sidewalks, crosses streets, and passes commercial buildings including a law office and market, with light traffic and scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: suburban sidewalk with law office and residential houses

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past a concrete wall and law office building

entered.detail: white concrete wall with chain link fence on top
short yellow post near the wall corner
commercial building with blue awning and 'Law Office' signage
mature trees lining the sidewalk with dense green canopy
single-family homes visible behind the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunny suburban sidewalk bordered by a concrete retaining wall on the left and a street with passing cars on the right. A law office building is visible across the street while residential houses line the left side, with mature oak trees providing shade.

events.description: character steps off sidewalk and begins crossing the asphalt street
yellow taxi passes by on the right while crossing the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a crosswalk and approaching a market building with pedestrians outside

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving past the intersection from right to left
group of three pedestrians standing outside the market entrance

entered.detail: brown commercial building with large red 'MARKET' signage above the entrance
painted white crosswalk lines on the road surface

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street at a crosswalk as a yellow taxi passes by. Approaching a commercial market building on the right, several pedestrians are gathered outside the entrance. The scene transitions from residential to commercial as the character moves past the intersection.

events.description: character passes a child pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a drainage canal, passing a child pedestrian

notable_agents.action: child wearing colorful rainbow outfit walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: concrete drainage ditch with metal railing running parallel to the sidewalk
bright blue fabric awning on the commercial building

segments.scene_description: The character continues along a sidewalk that runs parallel to a concrete drainage canal on the right. The market building falls behind as the character passes a child in colorful clothing walking the opposite way, with palm trees and passing cars visible.

events.description: approaching crosswalk at the next intersection with visible pedestrians waiting

agents.ego_description: walking toward an upcoming intersection with increasing pedestrian and vehicle activity

notable_agents.action: pedestrian waiting at the crosswalk ahead

entered.detail: road intersection with crosswalk lines and traffic signals visible ahead
wooden power pole with transformer and wires

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the tree-lined sidewalk approaching another intersection. The drainage canal ends behind as the character nears a crosswalk with a pedestrian waiting to cross, while moderate traffic flows on the adjacent street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunny suburban neighborhood that transitions from a residential street into a commercial district. It begins with the character walking along a sidewalk bordered by a concrete retaining wall and shaded oak trees, with a law office visible across the street. As the character crosses the road behind a passing yellow taxi, the environment shifts from residential houses to a commercial market where pedestrians gather near the entrance. The scene then opens up as the character moves past the intersection and follows a sidewalk running parallel to a concrete drainage canal, passing a child in colorful clothing under the shade of palm trees. Finally, the camera continues along the tree-lined path as the canal ends, approaching another busy intersection with moderate traffic and pedestrians waiting at the crosswalk.
